name: andrewsolomon-resume
description: main.tex is the source of truth. Builds main.pdf and an LWR website that renders the same content.

scripts.pdf:twice: npm run pdf && npm run pdf
scripts.dev: npm run sync && npm run web:dev
scripts.build: npm run sync && npm run pdf && npm run web:build
scripts.clean: rm -f main.aux main.log main.out && rm -rf web/site web/dist web/__lwr_cache__ web/.lwr
